{
  "claim_texts": [
    "California Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara extended a one-year moratorium on non-renewals of homeowners insurance policies in zip codes impacted by the Hughes Fire.",
    "Residents in the impacted areas know they can remain covered due to the moratorium on insurance non-renewals.",
    "Many residents are facing unaffordable insurance premiums in the wake of the Hughes Fire.",
    "The Hughes Fire is indicative of the increasing challenges posed by extreme wildfires in Los Angeles County.",
    "There is a perception among constituents that insurance providers may drop coverage due to proximity to wildfires."
  ]
}
